title: Importing Large MariaDB Dumps Without Timeouts
description: MariaDB imports failing or timing out? Split the dump and import in order.
author: SQLSplit

content.text: MariaDB behaves like MySQL during imports — big dumps can trigger timeouts and packet limits.
See also: **How to Fix phpMyAdmin Import Timeout Errors**.

faq.question: Does SQLSplit work for MariaDB?
faq.answer: Yes. MariaDB uses the same SQL dump format as MySQL.
